message:
fix: prevent division-by-zero and fix box title positioning

- unicode/search.rs: Add .max(1) to tab_width in four functions to
  prevent panic when tab_width=0 (find_wrap_position, find_position_by_width,
  get_prev_grapheme_start, calculate_text_width)
- buffer/drawing.rs: Fix box title clamping to respect right padding;
  max_x now accounts for padding on both sides
- Add test_tab_width_zero_does_not_panic regression test
- demo_showcase: minor adjustments from concurrent agent work

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
